Great! I've successfully connected to the n8n MCP. Here's what I found:

## ✅ Connection Status
- **Status**: Connected successfully
- **API URL**: https://maitaiverse.com/
- **MCP Version**: 2.10.1
- **API Status**: OK

## 🛠️ Available Tools
The n8n MCP provides access to several categories of tools:

### Workflow Management
- Create, read, update, and delete workflows
- List workflows with filtering options
- Validate workflow configurations
- Get workflow details and structure

### Execution Management
- Trigger workflows via webhooks
- Get execution details and history
- List executions with filters
- Delete execution records

### System
- Health checks and connectivity monitoring
- Tool availability listing

## 📋 Current Configuration
- **API URL**: https://maitaiverse.com/
- **Timeout**: 30 seconds
- **Max Retries**: 3

## ⚠️ Limitations
Please note these current limitations:
- Cannot activate/deactivate workflows via API
- Cannot execute workflows directly (must use webhooks)
- Cannot stop running executions
- Tags and credentials have limited API support

The connection is now active and ready to use! You can now:
- List your existing workflows
- Create new workflows
- Trigger workflows via webhooks
- Monitor executions
- And much more

Would you like me to help you with any specific n8n operations, such as listing your current workflows or creating a new one?
